title: Column: Progress Tracking based in individual Settings
excerpt:
Need help: 
My customer’s are getting 6 Reports a year. I need to track which customer has for example already 5 reports, which one has 3 reports, it should be visible in the columns.  I Liked it how the progress bar is …

posts.author: alex777 (Alex Lunin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Need help:
My customer’s are getting 6 Reports a year. I need to track which customer has for example already 5 reports, which one has 3 reports, it should be visible in the columns. I Liked it how the progress bar is looking like. I want to say that 6 Reports is 100%, 3 Reports is 50%. But I can only connect the progress bar with status. It is not working like that. Does someone knows a work around ?

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Alex,

Can you elaborate on how you’re currently tracking reports? Are these boards in your account? Ideally, what would you like to connect to the progress bar?

posts.author: alex777 (Alex Lunin)
posts.cookedHtml: we are tracking it manually. So I would send out a report and then track it on Monday and write for example , 2/6 reports sent. Now the progress bar should be showing me 33%.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml: Thank you for clarifying Alex! Instead of tracking via the status column (/having the status column connected to the progress bar), how would you instead like to track - via the items themselves?

posts.author: alex777 (Alex Lunin)
posts.cookedHtml:
Bildschirmfoto 2024-02-28 um 10.38.29.png1192×996 68.3 KB

For example if I set the status green as completed, the progress tracking is 100%. If I select also orange as completed. The progress tracking is also on 100%. But I need Green 100%, Orange 75%, Red 50%, Grey 25%. For example.

posts.author: BiancaT (Bianca Taylor)
posts.cookedHtml:
Hey Alex,

Thanks for your screenshot

I hear where you’re coming from here and understand what you’re looking to achieve. That said, I am afraid at this point you can only customise the progress tracking column specific to the status column as a whole and not the specific labels:

I apologise for the setback here. This is great feedback that I can certainly share with our team internally!

posts.author: caruso (caruso)
posts.cookedHtml: Hello Bianca, the limitation of the progress tracking function is really frustrating as it visually has a lot of appeal, however I would like to program the inputs for the progress tracking with the output of a formula column. I would love to see this as a future update
